_meta.warning: Always verify final enacted text and any IRS guidance before filing. Consult a tax professional for complex situations.

tipIncomeExclusion.notes: Tip income exclusion for qualifying service industry workers. Managers and business owners do not qualify.

overtimeExclusion.notes: Excludes overtime pay (hours >40/week) from taxable income up to this cap.

seniorDeduction.notes: Additional above-the-line deduction for taxpayers age 65 or older.

carLoanInterestDeduction.notes: Interest on auto loans for vehicles assembled in the United States only.

childTaxCredit.notes: CTC increased from $2,000 to $2,500 per qualifying child under age 17.

saltCap.notes: SALT deduction cap raised from TCJA's $10,000 to $40,000 for MFJ and $20,000 for Single/HOH. MFS unchanged at $10,000.

qbiDeduction.notes: Section 199A QBI deduction rate increased from 20% to 23% and made permanent.

estateAndGiftTaxExemption.notes: TCJA estate/gift tax exemption made permanent at $15M per person (indexed for inflation).

bonusDepreciation.notes: 100% bonus depreciation for qualified business property made permanent.
